# Security Policy

## Scope

This repository contains **public documentation, translations, and assets** for PouchVerse. It does not contain application source code or any executable software.

Security vulnerabilities in the PouchVerse app itself should be reported through the process described below.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in PouchVerse (the app), please **do not** open a public GitHub Issue.

Instead, report it privately:

1. Go to the [Security Advisories](https://github.com/ejiandan/PouchVerse-release/security/advisories/new) page
2. Click **"Report a vulnerability"**
3. Provide a clear description of the issue, steps to reproduce, and potential impact

We aim to acknowledge reports within **3 business days** and will keep you updated on the resolution timeline.

## What to Include in a Report

- A description of the vulnerability and its potential impact
- Steps to reproduce the issue
- Platform and app version affected
- Any relevant screenshots or logs (redact personal data)

## Out of Scope

The following are **not** considered security vulnerabilities for this repository:

- Typos or inaccuracies in documentation
- Broken external links
- UI/UX suggestions

Please use [Issues](https://github.com/ejiandan/PouchVerse-release/issues/new/choose) for those.

## Supported Versions

| Platform             | Status          |
|----------------------|-----------------|
| iOS / iPadOS (latest) | ✅ Supported   |
| macOS Transfer (latest) | ✅ Supported |
| Android (alpha)      | ⚠️ Alpha        |
| Windows Transfer (alpha) | ⚠️ Alpha   |

We support only the latest released version of each platform.
